name: bim-properties-panel
description: Property set viewer for the selected IFC element. Renders Pset_* and Qto_* data as grouped <dl> key/value pairs. BOOLEAN → checkbox (read-only in console), IfcLabel → text, IfcReal → number input, enum → <select>. Workplace allows write-back via service-buildings; console is read-only.
html:
WAL-EXT-001

IfcWall 2N1NMOV9z7$8Ww2DVqvxPB

Pset_WallCommon

ThermalTransmittance
FireRating
LoadBearing

variants.name: workplace
variants.description: Editable inputs; Save button triggers service-buildings PATCH /elements/{guid}/properties.

variants.name: console
variants.description: Read-only — all inputs disabled; Save button hidden.

aria: <dl> for each Pset. <dt> property name, <dd> property value. Group heading <h3> with aria-labelledby on section. Inputs carry aria-label matching the property name. role="region" on each Pset section.
